content:
Just launched MoodTracker today 🎯

I built this because every habit tracker I tried was either boring or too complicated. So I made one that's actually fun:

✅ Habit tracking with streaks (the "don't break the chain" psychology is REAL)

✅ Mood logging with an emoji scale

✅ Gamified points & badges (currently at Starter, working toward Champion)

✅ Analytics dashboard to see your progress

✅ Share achievements with friends

It's completely FREE. No login. No ads. Just download, add a habit, and see if you can beat my 5-day streak 😅

https://habit-mood-tracker--mospace36farah.replit.app

Genuinely want your feedback - what am I missing?

(Built in React if you're curious about the tech)
